utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final coverage plan: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and details — fully specified; (2) property_coverage includes both home/contents coverage and specialized photography equipment coverage with costs and details — fully specified; (3) travel_coverage is present with plan name, cost, and details — fully specified; (4) additional_services includes professional liability coverage with cost and details — fully specified; (5) total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown with detailed sub-items matching the coverage items — fully specified. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are included and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists several selected plans: LifeFirst Standard Plan39 (physical health), SecureLife Basic Plan (mental health), LifeFirst Standard Plan71 (home contents), LifeFirst Standard Plan70 (photography equipment), LifeFirst Standard Plan72 (travel), and LifeFirst Standard Plan69 (professional liability). To map these to the ground-truth ratings: (1) For physical health, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has a rating of 9. (2) For mental health, 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has a rating of 8. (3) For home contents, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content has a rating of 9. (4) For photography equipment, there is no explicit separate rating for 'LifeFirst Standard Plan70'; however, since it is a specialized property coverage under the same brand, it maps analogously to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' with rating 9. (5) For travel, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has a rating of 9. (6) For professional liability, no matching category or plan appears in the ground-truth data, so it cannot be rated and is left out of the mapping.
